message:
style(robot): apply gofmt formatting and fix indentation

Clean up robot mode package with consistent Go formatting:

robot_dashboard.go:
- Fix indentation in PrintDashboard() function
- Align struct field tags in DashboardOutput
- Correct nested loop indentation for session/pane iteration
- Standardize spacing in conditional blocks

robot.go:
- Remove trailing whitespace
- Clean up function spacing

ack.go:
- Format struct definitions consistently
- Align JSON tags

detection.go:
- Align pattern matching struct fields
- Format switch statement cases

health.go:
- Format health check result structs
- Align field definitions

The robot_dashboard.go file had significant indentation issues
where code blocks were indented with spaces instead of tabs,
causing inconsistent formatting. This commit normalizes all
indentation to use tabs per Go conventions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,11 +40,11 @@ type AckFailure struct {
 type AckType string
 
 const (
-	AckPromptReturned AckType = "prompt_returned"  // Agent showed ready prompt after processing
-	AckEchoDetected   AckType = "echo_detected"    // Agent echoed the input
-	AckExplicitAck    AckType = "explicit_ack"     // Agent responded with understood/acknowledged
-	AckOutputStarted  AckType = "output_started"   // Agent began producing output
-	AckNone           AckType = "none"             // No acknowledgment detected
+	AckPromptReturned AckType = "prompt_returned" // Agent showed ready prompt after processing
+	AckEchoDetected   AckType = "echo_detected"   // Agent echoed the input
+	AckExplicitAck    AckType = "explicit_ack"    // Agent responded with understood/acknowledged
+	AckOutputStarted  AckType = "output_started"  // Agent began producing output
+	AckNone           AckType = "none"            // No acknowledgment detected
 )
 
 // AckOptions configures the PrintAck operation
